name: LIKE Co., Ltd.
summary: LIKE Co., Ltd. provides a range of human resource services in Japan. The company's services include temporary staffing, outsourcing, recruitment, and recruitment and educational support; and outsourced and public childcare services. It also operates nursing homes that offer nursing care related services. The company was formerly known as J-COM Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to LIKE Co., Ltd. in December 2016. LIKE Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
